summary: Completed testing of Soul Food checkout flow and email integration features. All backend APIs (26 tests) pass. Frontend Amazon-like checkout flow working correctly with Sign In / Continue as Guest options.

issues: Login page appears to render with very light/white content - may need contrast review

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generator uses custom TOCEntryWithLeader Flowable class for dotted leader lines - well implemented
Email service properly configured with Resend API and kingdom-soul.com domain
Checkout flow correctly handles both logged-in and guest users with proper state management
seed_data_creation: Created test free orders during testing with customer_email parameter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features verified working: 1) Amazon-like checkout flow at /checkout shows Sign In vs Continue as Guest prompt when user not logged in. Sign In redirects to /login?redirect=/checkout?returning=true. Continue as Guest proceeds to full checkout form with email, coupon, gift options. 2) Email integration with Resend API - /api/email/config returns support email and topics, /api/payments/free-order with customer_email sends confirmation email. PDF TOC with dotted leaders implemented in pdf_generator.py.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/payments/free-order with customer_email creates order and sends email
GET /api/lessons returns lessons for PDF generation
frontend_ui_tests: Quick Order page displays products with Add to Cart
Checkout page shows Amazon-like guest prompt (Sign In / Continue as Guest)
Sign In button redirects to /login with proper return URL
Continue as Guest proceeds to full checkout form
Checkout form shows email input, coupon section, gift option, order notes
Proceed to Payment button visible with correct total

amazon_like_checkout.details: Guest prompt shows Sign In and Continue as Guest options. Sign In redirects to /login?redirect=/checkout?returning=true. Continue as Guest shows full checkout form.

pdf_toc_improvement.details: TOCEntryWithLeader custom Flowable class creates dotted leader lines between title and page number

email_integration.details: Resend API configured with kingdom-soul.com domain. /api/email/config returns support@kingdom-soul.com. Free orders with customer_email send confirmation emails.
